chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl. Sales Tax Reference Application 53 of 2016 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.1769/2016 2. For hearing of main case 16.09.2025 Mr. Hussain Mirza, advocate holds brief for Mr. Anwar Kashif Mumtaz, advocate for the applicant.. This reference application is pending since 2016 without any significant progress. Today a brief is being held and adjournment has been sought on behalf of the applicant without any cogent reason; therefore, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of Commissioner of Inland Revenue Lahore vs. Rafeh Limited (PLD 2020 SC 518), this reference application is dismissed in non-prosecution along with pending application(s). Judge Judge M. Khan
